hero.subtitle: Write simply, manage efficiently.
hero.description: Intuitive knowledge & task management tools that require no learning curve. Simplite is an open-source SaaS suite designed AI·MCP-native.

philosophy.title: Tools should disappear into the work. Not become it.
philosophy.description: You shouldn't spend time learning the tool. Simplite is built so you can focus on what you actually came to do — think, write, decide, and deploy. Simplicity is not a constraint; it's the hardest design outcome.
philosophy.pillar1_desc: Anyone opening it for the first time should find their flow within 5 minutes. Every Simplite product is designed on the one-page manual principle.
philosophy.pillar2_desc: Core features are Apache 2.0 — modify, self-host, and use commercially. We start with trust, not lock-in.
philosophy.pillar3_desc: Cloud is great, but so is your own server. We support both on-premise and SaaS — data sovereignty always stays with you.
philosophy.pillar4_desc: Anyone opening it for the first time should find their flow within 5 minutes. Every Simplite product is designed on the one-page manual principle.
philosophy.pillar5_desc: Core features are Apache 2.0 — modify, self-host, and use commercially. We start with trust, not lock-in.
philosophy.pillar6_desc: All data and work units are MCP-native, connecting naturally with your agents and workflows.

products.title: Two tools by Simplite. <accent>More coming soon</accent>.
products.aside: Knowledge and tasks are connected. We built Tika and MarkFlow as two axes, designed to work together.

tika.title: Bundle scattered tasks into goal-driven workflows.
tika.desc: Hierarchical tickets from Goal → Story → Feature → Task with drag-and-drop kanban. Burndown, workload, WBS/Gantt. One board from small teams to enterprise.
tika.notifyDesc: Auto deadline D-1 alerts, header bell dropdown

markflow.title: Build your team's knowledge structurally.
markflow.desc: Markdown-based dual editor with document relation maps. Convert docx, ppt, html, pdf to markdown. Presentation mode and Workers/Pages publishing.
markflow.editorDesc: Left markdown, right preview. LaTeX & code formatter
markflow.graphDesc: Visualize prev/next/parent relationships at a glance

why.title: Problems we <accent>solved</accent>.
why.aside: There are many work tools. But most become 'tools for managing tools'.
why.p1_bad: "What did I do yesterday?" The question repeated every morning
why.p1_good: Tika's hierarchical tickets connect scattered tasks by goals. Today's to-do and the team's quarterly goals move in the same structure.
why.p2_bad: "Where was that document?" Knowledge lost even with search
why.p2_good: MarkFlow's relational graph visualizes document connections. Not just search — follow context through structure.
why.p3_bad: "AI integrations are all paid/cloud" Tools unusable in air-gapped environments
why.p3_good: MCP native + on-premise LLM. Install on internal servers, attach your own models, complete AI automation within compliance.

enterprise.title: On-premise, in your environment.
enterprise.desc: Install the open-source version on your internal infrastructure and extend with enterprise features via commercial license. From fully air-gapped deployment to in-house LLM and SSO integration.

items.title: On-Premise Installation
items.desc: Full air-gapped deployment. Docker / Kubernetes / Helm Chart support.

items.title: Air-gap Compliance
items.desc: Works without external network. Finance & public sector certification in progress.

items.title: On-Premise LLM
items.desc: Attach your own open models for RAG·Agent automation. Data never leaves.

items.title: SSO / RBAC
items.desc: SAML·OIDC·LDAP support. Fine-grained role-based access. Full Audit Log.

items.title: RAG Pipeline Interface
items.desc: Configure & monitor the full Document → Embedding → Search → Generate pipeline via GUI.

items.title: MCP Native Agents
items.desc: All Tika·MarkFlow objects exposed via MCP. Connect naturally with your agents.

pricing.title: Start free, scale <accent>when you need</accent>.
pricing.aside: All core features are permanently free open-source. Team & Enterprise licenses add AI automation and enterprise features.

items.q: Is the Free (open-source) version truly free forever?
items.a: Yes. Tika and MarkFlow core are Apache 2.0 — personal, commercial, modification, and redistribution are all free. No cost for self-hosting, and community support is via GitHub Issues.

items.q: When will Team / Enterprise plans launch?
items.a: Currently in development, targeting H1 2026 beta launch. Register on the contact page to get priority access.

items.q: Can I use Tika and MarkFlow separately?
items.a: Each is designed as an independent product. However, thanks to MCP-native architecture, using both connects MarkFlow documents with Tika tickets naturally.

items.q: Which on-premise LLM models are supported?
items.a: Ollama and vLLM-based open models (Llama 3, Qwen, DeepSeek, etc.) are supported by default. Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint can be connected.

items.q: Can I migrate from existing tools (Jira, Notion, etc.)?
items.a: Tika supports Jira CSV Import, and MarkFlow supports bulk MD conversion from Notion, Confluence, docx, and pdf. Enterprise plan includes custom migration support.

items.q: What exactly does MCP native mean?
items.a: All tickets, documents, and workspace objects are exposed via Model Context Protocol spec. Claude Desktop, Cursor, and your own AI agents can directly access and modify Simplite data.

roadmap.title: Where we are and where we're going
roadmap.description: We transparently share our current development stages.

items.title: tika · markflow open-source release

items.desc: Enterprise features for large organizations. SAML, LDAP, SCIM provisioning and detailed audit logs.

items.title: tika ↔ markflow full bidirectional integration
items.desc: Handle tickets and notes seamlessly in a single workspace. Expand AI agents to leverage full context.

finalCta.title: Simply manage your knowledge and tasks.
finalCta.desc: Start with open source in 5 minutes. Enterprise gets a dedicated team.

footer.desc: Write simply, manage efficiently. Intuitive knowledge & task management suite.

tika.title: Plan Simply. Ship Boldly.
tika.sub: Hierarchical kanban for goal-driven work. Connect scattered tasks from Goal→Story→Feature→Task, and move the entire team on the same structure.
tika.demo_title: Move them with real <accent>drag and drop</accent>.
tika.demo_aside: The cards below are actually draggable. All Tika kanban interactions respond instantly like this.
tika.demo_note: ↑ Grab a card and drag it to another column
tika.hier_desc: From quarterly goals (Goal) to today's tasks (Task), everything lives in the same structure. See the parent goal from any ticket, and progress from any goal.
tika.feat_title: Enough for small teams, powerful enough for enterprise.

feat_items.title: Kanban Board + Drag & Drop
feat_items.desc: Backlog sidebar with TODO / In Progress / Done 3-column. Card moves reflect instantly with real-time filters & search.

feat_items.title: Ticket CRUD · 4 Types
feat_items.desc: Goal·Story·Feature·Task. Priority, dates, checklists, labels, comments, assignees — all in one ticket.

feat_items.title: Workspace & Permissions
feat_items.desc: OWNER / MEMBER / VIEWER 3-tier roles. 24h expiring invite links for safe external collaboration.

feat_items.title: WBS · Gantt Chart
feat_items.desc: Timeline-based visualization for progress at a glance. Team dashboards include burndown and workload.

feat_items.title: Slack · Telegram Alerts
feat_items.desc: Channel integration with auto D-1 deadline alerts. In-app header bell dropdown so nothing is missed.

feat_items.title: Search · Advanced Filters
feat_items.desc: Real-time search and filter chips. Save label/priority/date range combos as views and share across teams.

feat_items.title: Google OAuth · Onboarding
feat_items.desc: Secure login via NextAuth.js v5. Automatic workspace select/create flow on first entry.

feat_items.title: MCP Native
feat_items.desc: All tickets & workspaces exposed via MCP. Claude Desktop, Cursor, and external agents access Tika data directly.

feat_items.title: AI Automation
feat_items.desc: Auto-create tickets from meeting notes, suggest priorities, detect burndown anomalies. Available progressively in Team plan.

tika.cta_desc: Start with open source now, or contact us for team & enterprise deployment.

markflow.title: Write in Markdown. Think in Context.
markflow.sub: Build team knowledge in markdown, connect with relations, publish anywhere. A knowledge management system with document relation maps and dual editor.
markflow.dual_aside: Left side writes, right side renders. LaTeX formulas, code highlights, internal document links ([[]]) — all in real-time.
markflow.map_title: What it means to see documents as a <accent>graph</accent>.
markflow.map_aside: Search already exists everywhere. MarkFlow visualizes prev/next/parent/related relations, letting you navigate on context.
markflow.convert_aside: No need to abandon existing documents. docx, ppt, html, pdf convert to markdown while preserving structure.
markflow.feat_title: Everything you need for knowledge management.

feat_items.title: Dual Editor
feat_items.desc: Left markdown, right preview. Both sides scroll together for natural editing of long documents.

feat_items.title: Presentation Mode
feat_items.desc: Convert written documents directly to slides. Create documents and presentations from the same source.

feat_items.title: LaTeX · Code Formatter
feat_items.desc: Formulas, code blocks, diagrams, tables. Advanced formatting for academic & technical documents built-in.

feat_items.title: Document Relation Map
feat_items.desc: Prev/next/parent/related documents visualized as a graph. Navigate on context.

feat_items.title: Image · File Upload
feat_items.desc: Upload to built-in storage with just a drag. Inserted as markdown syntax the moment you drop.

feat_items.title: Team · Org Permissions
feat_items.desc: Workspace-level management, folder-level access. Mix public and private documents.

feat_items.title: One-click Publish
feat_items.desc: Cloudflare Workers · GitHub Pages integration. Set up once, then just press deploy.

feat_items.title: Internal Links · Tree Structure
feat_items.desc: Build manual/help sites as document trees and publish directly. No separate static site generator needed.

feat_items.title: AI Document Analysis
feat_items.desc: Auto summary, verification, source management. Dedicated AI assistant for team knowledge base in Enterprise plan.

markflow.cta_title: Write in Markdown. Think in Context.
markflow.cta_desc: Start with open source now, or contact us for team & enterprise deployment.
markflow.demo_body: MarkFlow is a **markdown-based** knowledge management system. Connect all your team's documents in one structure.
